items.briefing:
Instructure, the company behind the Canvas learning management system used widely in Australian education, has reportedly reached an "agreement" with hackers who stole user data in a recent breach. Details remain limited, but staff or students using Canvas should be alert to phishing attempts exploiting any leaked information. Separately, Australian organisations are being urged to strengthen ransomware defences, as a new Google report confirms AI is now routinely used by cybercriminals to make attacks faster and more convincing.

If your organisation uses Canvas, remind staff and students to watch for suspicious emails claiming to be from Instructure or your institution, and to avoid clicking unexpected links.
